headline: Fortive (FTV) Ties Accruent To PowerX For AI Telecom Energy Management
summary: Accruent, a Fortive (NYSE:FTV) operating company, has entered into a partnership with PowerX to integrate AI-driven energy management into telecom infrastructure. The collaboration will bring PowerX capabilities into Accruent’s Siterra platform, targeting more efficient energy use and cost control for telecom sites. For Fortive, this move sits at the intersection of software, industrial technology, and telecom infrastructure, where energy use and uptime are central concerns. Telecom...

headline: FFIV Set to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: F5 heads into Q3 earnings with hybrid multicloud, AI infrastructure demand and software growth in focus as investors watch if revenues meet guidance.

headline: Fortive's Continued Growth Does Not Justify An Upgrade At This Time
